rulings.Case Title: DAVID MOSCONE et al VS. JOI FULLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel Furtehr Responses To Discovery Against Defts Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 18, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFFs DAVID MOSCONE and GALE MOSCONE Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Against Defendants and Monetary Sanctions. Grant as to special and form interrogatories, request for production of documents and request for admission plus sanctions of $790 fees and costs. = (501/REQ)
